channel.title: Server-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Server-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Cockpit vs Webmin vs Ajenti: Best Self-Hosted Server Management Web UI 2026
item.description: Managing Linux servers through SSH terminals works fine for a single machine. But once you are running five, ten, or fifty servers — or you manage servers for clients who refuse to use a command line — a web-based administration interface becomes essential.

item.title: HestiaCP vs aaPanel vs Froxlor: Best Self-Hosted Web Hosting Control Panel 2026
item.description: Managing multiple websites, SSL certificates, email accounts, and databases on a single server can quickly become overwhelming when you rely on command-line tools alone. Web hosting control panels solve this problem by providing a unified web interface for every server administration task.
